_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement)

title: Validation Report
summary: This Data Item Description specifies the format, content, and intended use information for a Validation Report, aiding in contractor performance evaluation and validation data collection for various systems.
use_relationship: The Validation Report provides the results of contractor performance of validation procedures. a. This Data Item Description (DID) contains the format, content, and intended use information for the data deliverable resulting from the work task described in the solicitation. b. The Validation Report is used by the procuring activity to evaluate the results of the contractor validation effort. c. This DID is used on any contract and during any program phase to acquire validation data from the contractor on hardware, software, model-based systems engineering domain models, drawings, specifications, technical data packages, quality assurance provisions, packaging data sheets, and equipment publications (e.g., technical manuals). d. This DID supersedes DI-CMAN-80792A.
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Format.
preparation_instructions.content: The Validation Report format shall be contractor selected. The initially used format shall be used for all subsequent submissions.

preparation_instructions.title: Content. The Validation Report shall contain the following:

children.title: Contract number, Contract Data Requirements List (CDRL) sequence number, contractor name and address.
Date(s) on which validation procedures were performed and the method(s) of validation.
Summary of the Validation Report, which shall include:
Statement of objectives of the validation effort, to include the complete configuration information of the item being validated.
Summary results of the validation effort.
Identification of problems or deficiencies with impacts.
Complete minutes of the validation effort, itemizing each change made or proposed to be made, and the impact of item(s) changed or to be changed as a result of the validation effort.
A list of test equipment and tools, including revisions or version, used in any test procedure, maintenance procedure, or operation procedure validation.
A description of required software or framework, including tool definition.
A copy of all procedures used in any procedure validation.
Supporting data, containing any program specific data required to support validation.
Names of personnel in attendance during the validation procedures, their function, and their activity location.
A contractor's representative signature indicating certification of the technical adequacy, accuracy, and usability of the item undergoing validation.
